---
title: "5_260302_Robustness"
author: "Arturo Bertero"
date: "2026-03-02"
output: html_document
---

# Input

```{r}
# Libraries
library(pacman)
p_load(tidyverse, here, mgm, bootnet, reshape2, ggplot2, huge, conflicted)

# Options
rm(list = ls())
options(scipen = 999)
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::filter, dplyr::select)

# Data
master_datasets <- readRDS(here("Input", "Secondary", "master_datasets.rds"))
```

# Processing

## Preparation

```{r}
H1_matrices_npn <- list()
H2_matrices_npn <- list()

for (study_name in names(master_datasets)) {
  
  df <- master_datasets[[study_name]]
  
  # Base clean dataframe
  df_clean <- df %>% select(country, CM, CB, starts_with("cm_"), starts_with("cb_")) %>% na.omit()
  split_df <- split(df_clean[, setdiff(names(df_clean), "country")], df_clean$country)
  
  for (country_name in names(split_df)) {
    list_name <- paste0(study_name, "_", country_name)
    raw_matrix <- as.matrix(split_df[[country_name]])
    
    # H1 Setup: CM Index + cb_ items
    h1_raw <- raw_matrix[, c("CM", grep("^cb_", colnames(raw_matrix), value = TRUE))]
    # Apply nonparanormal transformation to the WHOLE H1 matrix
    H1_matrices_npn[[list_name]] <- huge.npn(h1_raw, verbose = FALSE)
    
    # H2 Setup: CB Index + cm_ items
    h2_raw <- raw_matrix[, c("CB", grep("^cm_", colnames(raw_matrix), value = TRUE))]
    # Apply nonparanormal transformation to the WHOLE H2 matrix
    H2_matrices_npn[[list_name]] <- huge.npn(h2_raw, verbose = FALSE)
  }
}
```

## Check one: results depends on the skewness of the items -> NPN networks

### Bootstapping

```{r}
# # Initialize lists for bootstraps
#  boot_results_H1_npn <- list()
#  boot_results_H2_npn <- list()
# 
# # The loop
# set.seed(123)
#  for (name in names(H1_matrices_npn)) {
#    cat("Bootstrapping NPN H1 for", name, "...\n")
#    boot_results_H1_npn[[name]] <- bootnet(H1_matrices_npn[[name]], nBoots = 1000, nCores = 16, default = "mgm", statistics = "strength")
#  }
#  
#  for (name in names(H2_matrices_npn)) {
#    cat("Bootstrapping NPN H2 for", name, "...\n")
#    boot_results_H2_npn[[name]] <- bootnet(H2_matrices_npn[[name]], nBoots = 1000, nCores = 16, default = "mgm", statistics = "strength")
#  }
# 
# # Save
#  saveRDS(boot_results_H1_npn, here("Input", "Secondary", "boot_H1_npn.rds"))
#  saveRDS(boot_results_H2_npn, here("Input", "Secondary", "boot_H2_npn.rds"))

# Load to save time
boot_results_H1_npn <- readRDS(here("Input", "Secondary", "boot_H1_npn.rds"))
boot_results_H2_npn <- readRDS(here("Input", "Secondary", "boot_H2_npn.rds"))

```

### Violins

```{r}
# H1 plot

# Extract values dynamically
boot_dataframes <- list()
for (name in names(boot_results_H1_npn)) {
  values <- boot_results_H1_npn[[name]][["bootTable"]][["value"]]
  node_names <- colnames(H1_matrices_npn[[name]])
  boot_dataframes[[name]] <- as.data.frame(matrix(values, ncol = length(node_names), byrow = TRUE))
  colnames(boot_dataframes[[name]]) <- node_names
}

# Melt and Bind
long_boot_list <- lapply(names(boot_dataframes), function(name) {
  df <- boot_dataframes[[name]]
  df$Dataset <- name 
  melt(df, id.vars = "Dataset", variable.name = "Node", value.name = "Centrality")
})
long_boot_data <- do.call(rbind, long_boot_list)

# Clean Names
long_boot_data <- long_boot_data %>%
  mutate(
    CountryRaw = Dataset %>% str_remove_all("Study1_SUSPECTS_|Study2_ACTS_|Study3_CMQ_|Study3_GCB_"),
    CountryName = case_when(
      CountryRaw == "DEU" ~ "Germany", CountryRaw == "ESP" ~ "Spain",
      CountryRaw == "FRA" ~ "France", CountryRaw == "GBR" ~ "United Kingdom",
      CountryRaw == "ITA" ~ "Italy", CountryRaw == "POL" ~ "Poland",
      CountryRaw == "SWE" ~ "Sweden", CountryRaw %in% c("USA", "USA_ACTS") ~ "United States",
      TRUE ~ CountryRaw 
    ),
    ScaleAcronym = case_when(
      grepl("Study1", Dataset) ~ "GCB5", grepl("Study2", Dataset) ~ "ACTS",
      grepl("Study3_CMQ", Dataset) ~ "CMQ", grepl("Study3_GCB", Dataset) ~ "GCB"
    ),
    FacetTitle = paste0(CountryName, " - ", ScaleAcronym, " (NPN Transformed)")
  )

# Calculate CIs
ci_data <- long_boot_data %>%
  group_by(FacetTitle, Node) %>%
  summarise(lower = quantile(Centrality, probs = 0.025), upper = quantile(Centrality, probs = 0.975), .groups = "drop")

violin_colors <- ifelse(unique(long_boot_data$Node) == "CM", "#006B3C", "#966FD6")
names(violin_colors) <- unique(long_boot_data$Node)

plot_groups <- list(
  "Study1" = "Study1_", "Study2" = "Study2_", 
  "Study3_CMQ" = "Study3_CMQ_", "Study3_GCB" = "Study3_GCB_"
)

# Plot and Save
for (group_name in names(plot_groups)) {
  prefix <- plot_groups[[group_name]]
  group_long_data <- long_boot_data %>% filter(grepl(paste0("^", prefix), Dataset))
  group_ci_data <- ci_data %>% filter(FacetTitle %in% unique(group_long_data$FacetTitle))
  
  group_plot <- ggplot(group_long_data, aes(x = Node, y = Centrality, fill = Node)) +
    geom_violin(alpha = 0.8) +
    geom_errorbar(data = group_ci_data, aes(x = Node, ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = violin_colors) +
    facet_wrap(~ FacetTitle, scales = "free_x", ncol = 2) + 
    labs(title = paste("H1 NPN Centrality:", group_name), x = "Node", y = "Centrality") +
    theme(legend.position = "none", axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
          axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"), plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 18, face = "bold"),
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  
  plot_height <- max(6, ceiling(length(unique(group_long_data$FacetTitle)) / 2) * 3)
  ggsave(here("Output", "Robustness", paste0("Robustness_NPN_H1_", group_name, ".pdf")), plot = group_plot, device = "pdf", width = 10, height = plot_height, units = "in")
}
```

```{r}
# H2 plot

# Extract values 
boot_dataframes_h2 <- list()
for (name in names(boot_results_H2_npn)) {
  values <- boot_results_H2_npn[[name]][["bootTable"]][["value"]]
  node_names <- colnames(H2_matrices_npn[[name]])
  boot_dataframes_h2[[name]] <- as.data.frame(matrix(values, ncol = length(node_names), byrow = TRUE))
  colnames(boot_dataframes_h2[[name]]) <- node_names
}

# Melt and Bind
long_boot_list_h2 <- lapply(names(boot_dataframes_h2), function(name) {
  df <- boot_dataframes_h2[[name]]
  df$Dataset <- name 
  melt(df, id.vars = "Dataset", variable.name = "Node", value.name = "Centrality")
})
long_boot_data_h2 <- do.call(rbind, long_boot_list_h2)

# Clean Names and Format Titles
long_boot_data_h2 <- long_boot_data_h2 %>%
  mutate(
    CountryRaw = Dataset %>% str_remove_all("Study1_SUSPECTS_|Study2_ACTS_|Study3_CMQ_|Study3_GCB_"),
    CountryName = case_when(
      CountryRaw == "DEU" ~ "Germany", CountryRaw == "ESP" ~ "Spain",
      CountryRaw == "FRA" ~ "France", CountryRaw == "GBR" ~ "United Kingdom",
      CountryRaw == "ITA" ~ "Italy", CountryRaw == "POL" ~ "Poland",
      CountryRaw == "SWE" ~ "Sweden", CountryRaw %in% c("USA", "USA_ACTS") ~ "United States",
      TRUE ~ CountryRaw 
    ),
    ScaleAcronym = case_when(
      grepl("Study1", Dataset) ~ "GCB5", grepl("Study2", Dataset) ~ "ACTS",
      grepl("Study3_CMQ", Dataset) ~ "CMQ", grepl("Study3_GCB", Dataset) ~ "GCB"
    ),
    FacetTitle = paste0(CountryName, " - ", ScaleAcronym, " (NPN Transformed)")
  )

# Calculate CIs 
ci_data_h2 <- long_boot_data_h2 %>%
  group_by(FacetTitle, Node) %>%
  summarise(lower = quantile(Centrality, probs = 0.025), upper = quantile(Centrality, probs = 0.975), .groups = "drop")

# Colors
violin_colors_h2 <- ifelse(unique(long_boot_data_h2$Node) == "CB", "#966FD6", "#006B3C")
names(violin_colors_h2) <- unique(long_boot_data_h2$Node)

# Plot and Save 
for (group_name in names(plot_groups)) {
  prefix <- plot_groups[[group_name]]
  group_long_data_h2 <- long_boot_data_h2 %>% filter(grepl(paste0("^", prefix), Dataset))
  group_ci_data_h2 <- ci_data_h2 %>% filter(FacetTitle %in% unique(group_long_data_h2$FacetTitle))
  
  group_plot_h2 <- ggplot(group_long_data_h2, aes(x = Node, y = Centrality, fill = Node)) +
    geom_violin(alpha = 0.8) +
    geom_errorbar(data = group_ci_data_h2, aes(x = Node, ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = violin_colors_h2) +
    facet_wrap(~ FacetTitle, scales = "free_x", ncol = 2) + 
    labs(title = paste("H2 NPN Centrality:", group_name), x = "Node", y = "Centrality") +
    theme(legend.position = "none", axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
          axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"), plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 18, face = "bold"),
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  
  plot_height <- max(6, ceiling(length(unique(group_long_data_h2$FacetTitle)) / 2) * 3)
  ggsave(here("Output", "Robustness", paste0("Robustness_NPN_H2_", group_name, ".pdf")), plot = group_plot_h2, device = "pdf", width = 10, height = plot_height, units = "in")
}
```

## Check 2: results depends on the different number of items in the CM and CB scales

### Option 1: networks with no sumscores (i.e.: mean centrality of H0 networks)

```{r}
# item-level matrices 
H0_matrices_item <- list()

for (study_name in names(master_datasets)) {
  df <- master_datasets[[study_name]]
  
  # Select items (no CM or CB indices)
  df_clean <- df %>%
    select(country, starts_with("cm_"), starts_with("cb_")) %>%
    na.omit()
  
  split_df <- split(df_clean[, setdiff(names(df_clean), "country")], df_clean$country)
  
  for (country_name in names(split_df)) {
    list_name <- paste0(study_name, "_", country_name)
    H0_matrices_item[[list_name]] <- as.matrix(split_df[[country_name]])
  }
}

# # Bootstrapping the Item-Level Networks
# set.seed(123)
#  boot_results_H0_item <- list()
# 
#  for (name in names(H0_matrices_item)) {
#    cat("Bootstrapping Item-Level for", name, "...\n")
#    boot_results_H0_item[[name]] <- bootnet(
#      H0_matrices_item[[name]], nBoots = 1000, nCores = 16, 
#      default = "mgm", statistics = "strength"
#    )
#  }
#  saveRDS(boot_results_H0_item, here("Input", "Secondary", "boot_H0_item.rds"))

# Load to save time
 boot_results_H0_item <- readRDS(here("Input", "Secondary", "boot_H0_item.rds"))


# Aggregate and plot

# Extract and average the centrality scores
boot_dataframes_item <- list()

for (name in names(boot_results_H0_item)) {
  
  values <- boot_results_H0_item[[name]][["bootTable"]][["value"]]
  node_names <- colnames(H0_matrices_item[[name]])
  n_nodes <- length(node_names)
  
  # Reshape vector to matrix (Rows = Boots, Cols = Nodes)
  values_matrix <- matrix(values, ncol = n_nodes, byrow = TRUE)
  values_dataframe <- as.data.frame(values_matrix)
  colnames(values_dataframe) <- node_names
  
  # Identify which columns belong to which construct
  cm_cols <- grep("^cm_", node_names, value = TRUE)
  cb_cols <- grep("^cb_", node_names, value = TRUE)
  
  # Calculate the avg centrality 
  values_dataframe$Mean_CM <- rowMeans(values_dataframe[, cm_cols, drop = FALSE])
  values_dataframe$Mean_CB <- rowMeans(values_dataframe[, cb_cols, drop = FALSE])
  
  # Keep only the aggregated columns
  boot_dataframes_item[[name]] <- values_dataframe[, c("Mean_CM", "Mean_CB")]
}

# Melt and Bind
long_boot_list_item <- lapply(names(boot_dataframes_item), function(name) {
  df <- boot_dataframes_item[[name]]
  df$Dataset <- name 
  melt(df, id.vars = "Dataset", variable.name = "Construct", value.name = "Centrality")
})
long_boot_data_item <- do.call(rbind, long_boot_list_item)

# Clean Names and Format Titles
long_boot_data_item <- long_boot_data_item %>%
  mutate(
    CountryRaw = Dataset %>% str_remove_all("Study1_SUSPECTS_|Study2_ACTS_|Study3_CMQ_|Study3_GCB_"),
    CountryName = case_when(
      CountryRaw == "DEU" ~ "Germany", CountryRaw == "ESP" ~ "Spain",
      CountryRaw == "FRA" ~ "France", CountryRaw == "GBR" ~ "United Kingdom",
      CountryRaw == "ITA" ~ "Italy", CountryRaw == "POL" ~ "Poland",
      CountryRaw == "SWE" ~ "Sweden", CountryRaw %in% c("USA", "USA_ACTS") ~ "United States",
      TRUE ~ CountryRaw 
    ),
    ScaleAcronym = case_when(
      grepl("Study1", Dataset) ~ "GCB5", grepl("Study2", Dataset) ~ "ACTS",
      grepl("Study3_CMQ", Dataset) ~ "CMQ", grepl("Study3_GCB", Dataset) ~ "GCB"
    ),
    FacetTitle = paste0(CountryName, " - ", ScaleAcronym, " (Item Avg)")
  )

# Calculate CIs for the averages
ci_data_item <- long_boot_data_item %>%
  group_by(FacetTitle, Construct) %>%
  summarise(lower = quantile(Centrality, probs = 0.025), upper = quantile(Centrality, probs = 0.975), .groups = "drop")

# Dynamic Colors
violin_colors_item <- c("Mean_CM" = "#006B3C", "Mean_CB" = "#966FD6")

# Plot and Save for each group
for (group_name in names(plot_groups)) {
  prefix <- plot_groups[[group_name]]
  group_long_data_item <- long_boot_data_item %>% filter(grepl(paste0("^", prefix), Dataset))
  group_ci_data_item <- ci_data_item %>% filter(FacetTitle %in% unique(group_long_data_item$FacetTitle))
  
  group_plot_item <- ggplot(group_long_data_item, aes(x = Construct, y = Centrality, fill = Construct)) +
    geom_violin(alpha = 0.8) +
    geom_errorbar(data = group_ci_data_item, aes(x = Construct, ymin = lower, ymax = upper), 
                  width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = violin_colors_item, labels = c("Mean_CB" = "Average CB Item", "Mean_CM" = "Average CM Item")) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Mean_CB" = "Avg CB", "Mean_CM" = "Avg CM")) +
    facet_wrap(~ FacetTitle, scales = "free_x", ncol = 2) + 
    labs(
      title = paste("Item-Level Aggregation Centrality:", group_name),
      x = "Construct Averages",
      y = "Average Centrality"
    ) +
    theme(legend.position = "none", axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
          axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"), plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 18, face = "bold"),
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size = 12, face = "bold"))
  
  plot_height <- max(6, ceiling(length(unique(group_long_data_item$FacetTitle)) / 2) * 3)
  ggsave(here("Output", "Robustness", paste0("Robustness_ItemAvg_", group_name, ".pdf")), plot = group_plot_item, device = "pdf", width = 10, height = plot_height, units = "in")
}
```

### Option 2: dropping cols iterativelly with kind of a monte carlo simulation

```{r}
# ==========================================
# 5. Monte Carlo Equal-Item Structural Check 
# ==========================================

set.seed(123) # Ensure reproducibility

monte_carlo_results <- list()
B <- 1000 

for (study_name in names(master_datasets)) {
  
  df <- master_datasets[[study_name]]
  df_clean <- df %>% select(country, starts_with("cm_"), starts_with("cb_")) %>% na.omit()
  split_df <- split(df_clean[, setdiff(names(df_clean), "country")], df_clean$country)
  
  for (country_name in names(split_df)) {
    list_name <- paste0(study_name, "_", country_name)
    data_matrix <- as.matrix(split_df[[country_name]])
    
    all_cm <- grep("^cm_", colnames(data_matrix), value = TRUE)
    all_cb <- grep("^cb_", colnames(data_matrix), value = TRUE)
    
    n_cm <- length(all_cm)
    n_cb <- length(all_cb)
    k <- min(n_cm, n_cb)
    
    cat("Starting Monte Carlo for", list_name, "- Fixing the smaller construct (k =", k, ") ...\n")
    
    # Initialize vectors for the 3 metrics
    country_delta_mean <- numeric(B)
    country_delta_max <- numeric(B)
    country_cm_top1 <- numeric(B)
    
    for (i in 1:B) {
      if (n_cm < n_cb) {
        sampled_cm <- all_cm
        sampled_cb <- sample(all_cb, k, replace = FALSE)
      } else if (n_cb < n_cm) {
        sampled_cm <- sample(all_cm, k, replace = FALSE)
        sampled_cb <- all_cb
      } else {
        sampled_cm <- all_cm
        sampled_cb <- all_cb
      }
      
      iter_matrix <- data_matrix[, c(sampled_cm, sampled_cb)]
      
      mgm_iter <- mgm(
        iter_matrix, type = rep("g", 2*k), level = rep(1, 2*k),
        lambdaSel = "EBIC", lambdaGam = 0.25, ruleReg = "OR", 
        verbose = FALSE, pbar = FALSE
      )
      
      # Calculate Node Strength
      strengths <- colSums(abs(mgm_iter$pairwise$wadj))
      names(strengths) <- colnames(iter_matrix)
      
      # 1. Delta Mean
      mean_cm <- mean(strengths[sampled_cm])
      mean_cb <- mean(strengths[sampled_cb])
      country_delta_mean[i] <- mean_cb - mean_cm
      
      # 2. Delta Max
      max_cm <- max(strengths[sampled_cm])
      max_cb <- max(strengths[sampled_cb])
      country_delta_max[i] <- max_cb - max_cm
      
      # 3. Winner (Binary CM_Top1) 
      winners <- names(strengths)[strengths == max(strengths)]
      country_cm_top1[i] <- as.numeric(any(winners %in% sampled_cm))
    }
    
    monte_carlo_results[[list_name]] <- data.frame(
      Dataset = list_name,
      Iteration = 1:B,
      Delta_Mean = country_delta_mean,
      Delta_Max = country_delta_max,
      CM_Top1 = country_cm_top1
    )
  }
}

mc_data <- do.call(rbind, monte_carlo_results)

# Clean Names and Format Titles
mc_data_clean <- mc_data %>%
  mutate(
    CountryRaw = Dataset %>% str_remove_all("Study1_SUSPECTS_|Study2_ACTS_|Study3_CMQ_|Study3_GCB_"),
    CountryName = case_when(
      CountryRaw == "DEU" ~ "Germany", CountryRaw == "ESP" ~ "Spain",
      CountryRaw == "FRA" ~ "France", CountryRaw == "GBR" ~ "United Kingdom",
      CountryRaw == "ITA" ~ "Italy", CountryRaw == "POL" ~ "Poland",
      CountryRaw == "SWE" ~ "Sweden", CountryRaw %in% c("USA", "USA_ACTS") ~ "United States",
      TRUE ~ CountryRaw 
    ),
    ScaleAcronym = case_when(
      grepl("Study1", Dataset) ~ "GCB5", grepl("Study2", Dataset) ~ "ACTS",
      grepl("Study3_CMQ", Dataset) ~ "CMQ", grepl("Study3_GCB", Dataset) ~ "GCB"
    ),
    FacetTitle = paste0(CountryName, " - ", ScaleAcronym)
  )

saveRDS(mc_data_clean, here("Input", "Secondary", "MonteCarlo.rds"))

# Load to save time
#mc_data_clean <- readRDS(here("Input", "Secondary", "MonteCarlo.rds"))
```

```{r}
# ==========================================
# 6. Plotting the Extended Monte Carlo Results
# ==========================================

plot_groups <- list("Study1" = "Study1_", "Study2" = "Study2_", "Study3_CMQ" = "Study3_CMQ_", "Study3_GCB" = "Study3_GCB_")

for (group_name in names(plot_groups)) {
  prefix <- plot_groups[[group_name]]
  group_mc_data <- mc_data_clean %>% filter(grepl(paste0("^", prefix), Dataset))
  
  plot_height <- max(5, ceiling(length(unique(group_mc_data$FacetTitle)) / 4) * 3.5)
  
  # PLOT A: Delta Mean (Block Average)
  plot_A <- ggplot(group_mc_data, aes(x = "CB vs CM", y = Delta_Mean)) +
    geom_violin(fill = "#966FD6", alpha = 0.7, color = "black") +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white", outlier.shape = NA) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "#E41A1C", linetype = "dashed", size = 1.2) + 
    facet_wrap(~ FacetTitle, scales = "fixed", ncol = 4) + 
    labs(
      title = paste("Plot A - Delta Mean:", group_name),
      subtitle = "Values > 0 indicate CB block average is higher than CM block average",
      x = "", y = expression(paste(Delta, " Mean (CB - CM)"))
    ) +
    theme_bw() + theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
                       plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"))
  
  ggsave(here("Output", "MC", paste0("MC_PlotA_Mean_", group_name, ".pdf")), plot = plot_A, width = 12, height = plot_height)
  
  # PLOT B: Delta Max (The Hub Test)
  plot_B <- ggplot(group_mc_data, aes(x = "CB vs CM", y = Delta_Max)) +
    geom_violin(fill = "#FF7F00", alpha = 0.7, color = "black") + # Orange for distinction
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white", outlier.shape = NA) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "#E41A1C", linetype = "dashed", size = 1.2) + 
    facet_wrap(~ FacetTitle, scales = "fixed", ncol = 4) + 
    labs(
      title = paste("Plot B - Delta Max (Hub Test):", group_name),
      subtitle = "Values > 0 indicate the absolute most central node is a specific Conspiracy Belief",
      x = "", y = expression(paste(Delta, " Max (Max CB - Max CM)"))
    ) +
    theme_bw() + theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
                       plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"))
  
  ggsave(here("Output", "MC",  paste0("MC_PlotB_Max_", group_name, ".pdf")), plot = plot_B, width = 12, height = plot_height)
  
  # PLOT C: Top-1 Probability (Executive Summary)
  # Calculate exact binomial intervals (Clopper-Pearson) for the Monte Carlo precision
  summary_data <- group_mc_data %>%
    group_by(FacetTitle) %>%
    summarise(
      Successes = sum(CM_Top1),
      Total = n(),
      Probability = mean(CM_Top1),
      # Extracting exact confidence intervals safely handling 0% or 100% cases
      Lower_CI = binom.test(Successes, Total)$conf.int[1],
      Upper_CI = binom.test(Successes, Total)$conf.int[2],
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  plot_C <- ggplot(summary_data, aes(x = reorder(FacetTitle, Probability), y = Probability)) +
    geom_point(color = "#006B3C", size = 4) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Lower_CI, ymax = Upper_CI), width = 0.2, color = "black") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, color = "grey50", linetype = "dashed") +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), labels = scales::percent_format()) +
    coord_flip() + # Horizontal layout is much easier to read for dot plots
    labs(
      title = paste("Plot C - Probability CM is the Network Hub:", group_name),
      subtitle = "Error bars represent 95% Monte Carlo simulation intervals", # EXPLICIT LABEL
      x = "", y = "Probability (Top-1 Hub Status)"
    ) +
    theme_bw() + 
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"), 
      plot.subtitle = element_text(face = "italic"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold")
    )
  
  ggsave(here("Output", "MC", paste0("MC_PlotC_Prob_", group_name, ".pdf")), plot = plot_C, width = 10, height = max(4, nrow(summary_data) * 0.6))
}
```
